markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a potential community leadership role for Carly at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX's "AI Led Growth" community needs a leader.** It's a marketing vehicle for its AI-native agency, aiming to be a hybrid of Reforge (content) and Exit 5 (discussion).](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Carly is unavailable due to a 12-month non-compete.** The community's exec track and paid model create a direct conflict with her former employer, Pavilion.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [**Pavilion's success formula:** A clear problem statement ("us vs. them" narrative), a "give to get" culture enforced by a code of conduct, and key metrics like NPS and retention.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [**Carly will act as an informal advisor,** providing feedback and connecting Jason with potential community leader candidates from her network.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX & "AI Led Growth" Community

  - [**GrowthX Agency:** An AI-native marketing agency proving a new, more efficient way to work.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** Claims to be 4–5x more efficient than traditional SEO agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
      - [**Productization:** The agency's internal platform will eventually be released as a standalone product.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [**"AI Led Growth" Community:** The agency's primary marketing vehicle.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [**Goal:** Evangelize AI in growth and marketing, becoming the go-to place for upskilling.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Model:** A hybrid of Reforge (structured content) and Exit 5 (peer discussion).](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [**Audience Tracks:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
          - [**Operator Track:** Marketers and growth professionals.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
              - [**Status:** 70 paying members at $200/year for workshop recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
          - [**Exec Track:** Senior leaders and potential agency clients.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
              - [**Status:** Free; modeled after Hampton, with private dinners and fireside chats.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [**Community Need:** A dedicated leader to own strategy, growth, and operations.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### Pavilion's Community Success Model

  - [**Problem Statement:** A clear, unifying narrative ("The average tenure of a VP of sales is 18 months") that created camaraderie by framing a shared challenge.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [**"Give to Get" Culture:** The core value, enforced via:](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Onboarding:** Members accept a code of conduct explaining the value.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [**Messaging:** Regular reminders in newsletters and Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Enforcement:** Proactive moderation with warnings and expulsions for non-compliant behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [**Retention:** The ultimate measure of value; monthly members provide a faster feedback loop.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**NPS:** Trailing 90-day NPS is a leading indicator of member satisfaction.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
      - [**Annual Surveys:** Used to measure specific outcomes (e.g., new job, raise).](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [**Member Health Score:** A composite metric tracking engagement across all platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [**Engagement Channels:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
      - **Slack:** The \#1 ranked member value; \~50% monthly active users.
      - [**Pathfinder Bot:** An AI bot (powered by Tribble) that answers questions by pulling from all community content (Slack, events, courses). It also suggests relevant members to connect with.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)
      - [**In-Person Events:** Chapters and private dinners.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
      - [**1-on-1 Matching:** A tool (Orbit) to facilitate member connections.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)

### Outcome: Carly Cannot Join

  - [**Reason:** A 12-month non-compete from Pavilion.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The community's paid model and exec track create a direct, competitive overlap.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [**Offer:** To serve as an informal advisor, providing feedback and connecting Jason with candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=2313.0)
      - [Connect Jason with potential community leader candidates from her network.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=2313.0)
      - [Introduce Jason to a former Pavilion content lead for a potential full-time role.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=2313.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)
      - [Follow up with Carly for introductions to candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/ZTi7k3X4cVriq5-qjnym_FDCJY1Dp8xY?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
